heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear. Locally dense fog forming in the river valleys. Lows in the 50s, with some 40s in the cooler valleys, nearing 60 along Lake Champlain. Light and variable wind.

heading: Saturday
text: A few patches of early morning fog, burning off to mostly sunny skies. Highs in the 80s. Light wind becoming south near 5 mph.

heading: Saturday Night
text: Mostly clear, followed by periods of clouds developing overnight. Lows in the 50s to near 60, some mid 60s along Lake Champlain. Light and variable wind.
